summary:
The term "ICD" refers specifically to International Classification of Diseases; thus, when followed by "-10," it denotes version ten of that classification standard utilized globally within medical settings.
``` To summarize Agent2's reasoning into two sentences focusing on key clinical points:

The term ICD-10 means International Classification of Diseases, 10th revision—a global standardized diagnostic tool widely used in health care. This classification helps ensure consistent diagnosis and treatment documentation across different countries and systems.
